query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
  SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount') IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_close,
  SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.principal_paid') IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_principal,
  SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.source') = 'installment' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS source_installment,
  SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS source_null
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND DATE(paid_at) BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-04-30';

  SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS source_null
